description.ko: 천체들이 심해의 절대적 어둠과 하나가 되는 우주의 고요한 영역을 시각적으로 탐구합니다.
description.en: A visual exploration of the silent reaches of the universe, where celestial structures merge with the absolute darkness of the deep void.

prompt: A cinematic wide shot of the deep cosmic void, swirling dark matter nebulae with faint bioluminescent pulses, distant cold stars flickering in the distance, ethereal atmospheric dust, high-contrast lighting, 8k resolution, surrealist space exploration, VOID-3 style
